productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Apex Black Laptop Bag
description: Carry your laptop in style with this Apex bag from puma. With ample space for other office accessories besides your laptop, the bag is perfectly suited for the office and other heavy usages. Length: 30 cm Width: 40 cm Depth: 11 cm Made of 100% polyester Large zippered compartment with closable laptop compartment Adjustable shoulder strap fits any size Brand logo in rubber print on the front Care only hand wash Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not bleach, tumble dry or wring Line dry Do not iron
